entries.title: The Beginning
entries.body: Cameron and Sophie stepped aboard Juno's 7 to begin their first season working together on the same yacht. A marina webcam captured the moment they boarded for the first time. The footage is grainy, but it preserves the start of the story exactly as it happened.

entries.title: Learning the Ropes
entries.body: Cameron was already settling into the rhythm of deck work: lines, fenders, washdowns and the quiet precision that sits behind every smooth arrival.

entries.title: First Days on Deck
entries.body: The early days aboard quickly settled into the rhythm of exterior maintenance: cleaning, polishing and keeping the yacht looking immaculate beneath the Mediterranean sun.
entries.quote: Giving the sun deck black some love.

entries.title: Still Filthy
entries.body: A perfectly honest summary of life on deck: however beautiful the setting, salt, sun and dust never stop working against the crew.
entries.quote: Spent the last 3 days cleaning the thing and tbh, still filthy.

entries.title: Rather Rocky
entries.body: The sea showed a livelier side during the late morning passage.

entries.title: Sophie's First Jet Ski
entries.body: The captain invited Cameron to take Sophie out on a jet ski. It became Sophie's first time on one: a small, generous moment that belongs in the season highlights.
entries.quote: Captain was going out on the Ski with his Mrs who’s onboard as well and he asked me if I wanted to take Soph out so we went out on one for 15 minutes.

entries.title: My Future House
entries.body: Passing a beautiful hillside house above the water, Sophie captured one of those light-hearted travel moments that instantly becomes part of the shared story.

entries.title: A Short Video from Sophie
entries.body: A short video from Sophie became another small window into the season: the kind of moving postcard that the interactive journal can preserve better than print.

entries.title: Nice Spot for Today
entries.body: A quiet anchorage surrounded by clear water and green hills. The toys were out, the tender was alongside, and the day had the stillness that makes the Greek islands unforgettable.
